robustness_summary: Available as central tendency companion for p90 interpretation.
caveat: Represents mixed-cell average radiant exposure; may hide upper-tail pockets.

robustness_summary: Available as a shoulder-of-distribution check on p90.
advantages: Checks whether p90 signal is also visible below the tail.
risks: May be too mild for high-tail prioritisation.
caveat: Core 8 is a small diagnostic sample; p90 is operational, not an external standard.

robustness_summary: Core 8 supports p90 as stable mixed-cell upper-tail radiant exposure metric; not canonical yet.
advantages: Retains high radiant exposure signal without relying on a single maximum pixel.
risks: Operational choice; canonical promotion needs larger stratified sample and companion metrics.
downstream_use: System B provisional target family; not local WBGT, not risk.
caveat: Core 8 supports p90 as stable mixed-cell upper-tail target, but canonical promotion requires N=24 validation and companion metrics.

robustness_summary: Available as a higher-tail check on p90 stability.
advantages: Checks sensitivity to the upper tail beyond p90.
risks: More tail-sensitive and potentially less stable than p90.
caveat: Moderate agreement with p90; captures more extreme upper-tail behavior.

robustness_summary: Available, but max is more sensitive to extreme cells than p90.
advantages: Useful stress test for extreme upper-bound behavior.
risks: Most vulnerable to single-pixel artifacts or edge effects.
caveat: Weak agreement with p90; likely captures pixel-level extremes/outliers.

robustness_summary: Available in modifier targets and directly expresses p90 departure from the same-hour reference.
advantages: Controls for same-hour reference level and improves scenario-normalized comparison.
risks: Depends on reference-domain definition and can hide absolute high values.
downstream_use: Companion for normalized scenario and hour comparison.
caveat: Derived from p90; useful for scenario/reference-normalized physical delta

robustness_summary: Available in modifier targets as percentile-like radiant modifier.
advantages: Compact percentile-like modifier for ranking and communication.
risks: Relative scale can obscure absolute magnitude differences.
caveat: Derived normalized rank modifier from p90/delta target; useful for relative priority

robustness_summary: Not available in current normalized Core 8 target summary.
advantages: Can express area share above radiant threshold when available.
risks: Requires explicit threshold definition and pedestrian relevance review.
caveat: Not available in current Core 8 summary; add in next aggregation pass.
